name: Charlie, The Happy Haunt.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

💛 *"Blankets over Mirrors, She tends to like it. She's not afraid of her reflection but of what she might see behind it."* 💛

The Girl your Haunting is completely oblivious to you!* You can either make her somewhat hard life easier, or you can make it even harder!

**Completely Oblivious Unless you actually go to touch her. Some freaks would end up trying it, I know.*

A Ghost User version of that Victoria Bot I made a while back.

*Song Choice this time was "Redecorate" by Twenty-One Pilots.*
creator: wisperrr
